summary: Frontend testing for 'Visualizza come Cliente' and 'Visualizza Partner' features - ALL TESTS PASSED. Admin can view client and partner sections as users see them.
passed_tests: ✅ Admin login works with credentials: claudio.bertogliatti@gmail.com / Evoluzione74
✅ 'Gestione Clienti' section accessible via Cliente button -> Torna Admin flow
✅ 'Visualizza come Cliente' button present in client details panel (AdminClientiPanel)
✅ Clicking 'Visualizza come Cliente' switches to cliente view with selected client data
✅ 'VISUALIZZANDO CLIENTE' label shows client info (name, email) in sidebar
✅ 'Torna Admin' button returns to admin mode from cliente view
✅ 'Pipeline Partner' section shows list of partners with 'AZIONI' column
✅ 'Visualizza' button present in each partner row (AdminPartners)
✅ Clicking 'Visualizza' on partner switches to partner view with selected partner data
✅ 'Admin' button in partner view returns to admin dashboard
critical_code_review_comments: Mode switching logic in App.js correctly handles admin/partner/cliente modes
AdminClientiPanel correctly receives and uses onViewAsCliente prop
AdminPartners correctly receives and uses onViewAsPartner callback
Sidebar shows appropriate context when viewing as cliente (VISUALIZZANDO CLIENTE label)
Navigation flow: Admin -> Cliente button -> Torna Admin -> Gestione Clienti is working
seed_data_creation: Used existing clients (Andrea Bianchi, Elena Rossi, Marco Neri) and partners (Marco Ferretti, Arianna Aceto, etc.) from database
context_for_next_testing_agent: The 'Visualizza come Cliente' and 'Visualizza Partner' features are fully functional. Admin can: 1) Navigate to Gestione Clienti via Cliente button -> Torna Admin, 2) Click on a client to see details panel with 'Visualizza come Cliente' button, 3) View cliente area as that specific client sees it, 4) Navigate to Pipeline Partner via Partner nav item, 5) Click 'Visualizza' on any partner to view their dashboard, 6) Return to admin mode via Admin button.

verified_features.visualizza_come_cliente: WORKING - Button in AdminClientiPanel detail panel, switches to cliente view with client data
verified_features.visualizza_partner: WORKING - Button in AdminPartners list, switches to partner view with partner data

navigation_notes.gestione_clienti_access: Admin -> Click 'Cliente' button in sidebar -> Click 'Torna Admin' -> Gestione Clienti page
navigation_notes.pipeline_partner_access: Admin -> Click 'Partner' nav item in sidebar -> Pipeline Partner page
navigation_notes.cliente_view_access: Gestione Clienti -> Click client row -> Click 'Visualizza come Cliente' button
navigation_notes.partner_view_access: Pipeline Partner -> Click 'Visualizza' button on partner row
